prompt: Create a dark cinematic fantasy portrait of a winged lion-knight angel standing full body on a rain-soaked gothic balcony above a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The warrior wears ornate blackened steel plate armor with antique gold trim and deep emerald-green cloth panels, battered and wet, with a heraldic golden lion on the chest. The face is intentionally hidden by a smooth dark rectangular shadow/blur mask, while long wild silver-gray hair streams dramatically to the left in the wind. Include exactly 2 enormous mechanical feathered wings spread behind the figure, one on each side, made of black metal plates with glowing orange circuitry and exactly 2 bright circular orange turbine-like cores, one near the base of each wing. The warrior holds exactly 1 large kite shield in the right hand, dark green and black with a gold riveted border and a golden rampant lion emblem, and exactly 1 glowing cracked energy sword in the left hand angled downward, blazing with orange lightning sparks. Visible heraldry count: exactly 2 golden lion emblems, one on the chest and one on the shield. The background is a dense rainy skyline of tall skyscrapers with scattered neon windows and distant red lights, seen through heavy rainfall. Use dramatic low-key lighting, wet reflective stone floor, stormy atmosphere, ultra-detailed textures, gothic dark fantasy mixed with cyberpunk, high contrast orange glow accents, realistic digital painting, vertical 4:5 composition, centered heroic stance, no text, no watermark.
